data.title: 国际服活动「Cherry Blossom Festival Commotion」
data.summary: [New Event Preview] Blue Archive's first event will be arriving on 11/29 (Mon)! A commotion surround
data.body:
[New Event Preview]

Blue Archive's first event will be arriving on 11/29 (Mon)!
A commotion surrounds the Allied Hyakkiyako Academy's festival. I can't wait, too!

#BlueArchive
![eSttgbLThd5nbE0hdIyDOPNZ1EaARWld.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/eSttgbLThd5nbE0hdIyDOPNZ1EaARWld.jpg)
